📖 NEET 2026 — Complete App Guide

⚡ Prep Pulse — Made by Arjun Prajapat
Link se directly Chrome mein install prompt aayega

🌅 Daily Routine (Fill Karo)

  • 📋 Today Planner — Subah tasks add karo (subject, chapter, task type, priority)
  • 📖 Study Log — Raat ko hours fill karo (Physics/Chem/Bio separately)
  • ✅ Checklist — Dashboard pe daily items tick karo
  • 🎭 Mood Tracker — Dashboard pe apna mood log karo roz
  • 💧 Water Reminder — Har 45 min pe automatic reminder (Settings se band karo)

📚 Study Tools

  • 🗂️ Tracker — Chapter-wise task status click karo: ○ → 📌 Today → 📅 Tomorrow → ✅ Done. Chapter pe note bhi add karo (✎ icon).
  • 🧪 Mock Tests — Test scores daalo, subject-wise analysis dekho, last 2 mocks ka Improvement Analyzer bhi hai
  • 📝 Quick Notes — Important points note karo, search bhi kar sakte ho
  • ⏱ Timer — Countdown ya ⏱ Stopwatch (Count Up) mode — dono mein sessions count hote hain. Focus Mode (fullscreen) bhi hai!
  • 🃏 Flashcards — Formula/concept cards banao (image bhi add kar sakte ho)
  • ❓ Doubt Book — Doubts log karo, image attach karo, resolve karo
  • 🎵 Focus Music Player — Timer page pe: White Noise, Brown Noise, 🧠 Binaural 40Hz, Rain, Cafe. Internet nahi chahiye!

📷 Camera Study Monitor

  • 📷 PiP Camera — Camera icon se side-mein chhota camera window khulta hai — padhte raho, monitor hota rahega
  • 📊 Camera Sessions Tracker — Jab bhi camera band karo → session automatically save hota hai! Dashboard pe Aaj vs Kal comparison dikhta hai
  • ⭐ Camera Points — Har camera session = 3 pts + 1pt per 10 min study time!
  • 📜 Session History — Camera Sessions card mein "Full History" se last 7 din ka data dekho
  • 📱 DroidCam Support — Phone ka camera bhi use kar sakte ho WiFi se (DroidCam app)
  • 🎯 Focus % — Camera detect karta hai kitne time aap screen ke saamne the — focus percentage dikhta hai

📊 Dashboard Widgets

  • ⏰ Live Countdown — NEET tak real-time Days:Hours:Mins:Secs countdown
  • ⚡ Study Pace — Aaj kitna target complete hua aur remaining time mein kitna chahiye
  • 🎯 Subject Focus Breakdown — Physics/Chem/Bio time distribution vs NEET ideal (30/30/40)
  • 🧠 Focus Summary — Aaj ke timer sessions count, minutes, hours
  • 📷 Camera Sessions — Aaj vs Kal camera study comparison
  • 🎯 Marks → Rank Calculator — Sliders se marks set karo → instant rank, percentile, AIIMS/MBBS eligibility
  • 📅 Week Outlook — Agale 7 din ka study plan preview
  • 🔥 Streak Reminder — Agar aaj study nahi ki to red alert!
  • 🚨 Exam Urgency Alert — 90 din se kam bache to activate hota hai

📊 Analysis Tools

  • ⚠️ Weak Chapters — Auto-detect karo kamzor topics
  • 🏅 Rank Estimator — Score daal ke rank estimate karo (Mocks page)
  • 🗓 Auto Schedule — Pending chapters se aaj ka schedule generate karo
  • 📜 History — Sab activities ka record (auto-update hota hai tracker se)
  • 📐 Spaced Repetition — Dashboard pe Revision Scheduler — 1→3→7→14→30 days cycle
  • 🎯 Subject Target Dials — Aaj ke subject-wise target vs actual progress
  • 📅 Off Day Planner — Schedule page mein upcoming off days plan karo + feasibility check

🏆 Points & Gamification

  • ⭐ XP Points — Tasks complete karo → pts milte hain (High=15, Med=10, Low=5)
  • 📷 Camera Points — Camera session = 3pts + 1pt/10min
  • 🎯 Daily Challenges — Roz 4 challenges: Study + Productivity + Health + Bonus
  • 🏅 Badges — Achievements unlock karo (Streak badges, Mock badges, etc.)
  • 🎊 Chapter Celebration — 100% chapter complete = confetti popup!
  • 📈 Level System — Beginner → Reader → Hustler → Warrior → Champion → NEET Warrior

⌨️ Shortcuts

  • Alt+1…0 — Pages switch karo
  • Alt+T — Theme toggle (Dark/Light/AMOLED/Purple/Ocean)
  • Alt+F — Focus mode (fullscreen timer)
  • Alt+N — Quick Note
  • Space — Timer start/pause
  • Swipe Left/Right — Mobile pe pages switch karo

💡 Pro Tips

  • 📷 Camera on karo har session mein → automatically points milte hain + history track hoti hai
  • Tracker mein ✅ Complete karo → History mein auto add hota hai + Today Planner sync
  • Stopwatch mein "💾 Save Session" dabao → Focus Hours aur Timer Points mein count hoga
  • 📥 Settings → Download App se saara data save karo (file download hoti hai)
  • 🔒 Settings mein "Share with Password" — file kisi ko share karo with password protection
  • 📱 Mobile pe "Add to Home Screen" (browser menu) → App jaisa feel!
  • 🎵 Binaural beats headphones pe lagao — dono kaan mein alag frequency = focus boost!

🆕 V18 New Features

  • 🎯 Daily Challenges — Nav mein Challenges tab! Roz 4 naye challenges (NEET, productivity, health). Complete karo → points!
  • 🏆 21-Day Challenge — Challenges page pe 21-day habit tracker. Roz mark karo, streak banao!
  • 📷 PiP Camera Monitor — Camera chhota side mein rehta hai jab padh rahe ho. Count-up timer bhi! Alt+C se toggle.
  • 📹 DroidCam PiP — Phone ko webcam ki jagah use karo! IP:Port dalo, Camera Source mein connect karo.
  • ⏱ Count-Up Timer Fixed — Timer page pe Stopwatch mode ab focus mode mein bhi kaam karta hai.

🆕 V19 New Features

  • 🔄 Multi-Exam Countdown Switch — Dashboard pe countdown mein neeche exam switch buttons aate hain — NEET + koi bhi custom exam ke beech switch karo!
  • ✏️ Change Date Button Fixed — Countdown block ka "Change Date" button ab properly kaam karta hai — exam name + date dono badal sakte ho!
  • 🎯 Auto Daily Challenges — Roz midnight ke baad automatically 4 naye challenges generate ho jaate hain (NEET study + productivity + health)!
  • 📊 Subject Focus Breakdown — Dashboard pe Physics/Chemistry/Biology ka total time breakdown + NEET ideal distribution se compare!
  • ⚡ Daily Study Pace — Real-time dikhata hai aaj target ka kitna complete hua aur remaining hours mein kitni pace chahiye!
  • 🧠 Focus Sessions Summary — Dashboard pe aaj ke timer sessions, total minutes aur focus badge ek saath!
  • 📅 Week Outlook — Agale 7 din ka preview — study hours, tasks, mock tests sab ek jagah!

🆕 V21 New Features

  • 📷 Camera Study Sessions Tracker — Jab bhi camera se padho (PiP Camera on karo), session automatically count hoga! Points milenge (3pts per session + 1pt/10min), aur dashboard pe Aaj vs Kal comparison dikhega — kitne sessions, kitna time. Full 7-day history bhi dekh sakte ho.

🆕 V20 Features

  • 🎊 Chapter Completion Celebration — Jab bhi koi chapter 100% complete karo — special celebration popup aata hai confetti ke saath! Motivation boost guaranteed.
  • 🎯 Quick Marks → Rank Calculator — Dashboard pe sliders se Physics/Chemistry/Biology marks set karo — instantly Total, Percentile, Expected Rank, aur AIIMS/MBBS eligibility dekho.
  • 🎵 Focus Music / White Noise Player — Timer page pe built-in sound player: White Noise, Brown Noise, 🧠 Binaural Focus Tones (40Hz), Rain, aur Cafe Ambience. Internet nahi chahiye! Volume control bhi hai.

🆕 V18 New Features

  • 🎯 Daily Challenges — Nav mein Challenges tab! Roz 4 naye challenges (NEET, productivity, health). Complete karo → points!
  • 🏆 21-Day Challenge — Challenges page pe 21-day habit tracker. Roz mark karo, streak banao!
  • 📷 PiP Camera Monitor — Camera chhota side mein rehta hai jab padh rahe ho. Count-up timer bhi! Alt+C se toggle.
  • 📹 DroidCam PiP — Phone ko webcam ki jagah use karo! IP:Port dalo, Camera Source mein connect karo.
  • ⏱ Count-Up Timer Fixed — Timer page pe Stopwatch mode ab focus mode mein bhi kaam karta hai.

⚙️ Settings
📲 App Install — Home Screen pe Add Karo
NEET Tracker ko phone ke home screen par install karo — bilkul real app jaisa! Chrome open karne ki zaroorat nahi padegi.
🔍 Checking install status...
📱 Android Chrome: Button dabao ya Chrome menu (⋮) → "Add to Home Screen"
🍎 iPhone Safari: Share ⬆ button → "Add to Home Screen"
📟 Samsung Browser: Menu → "Add page to" → "Home screen"
🔐 App Permissions
🔔 Notifications
Timer complete, Study reminders, Streak alerts
📳 Vibration
Timer alerts, Task complete feedback
✅ Available
🎙️ Microphone / Audio
Focus music, Binaural beats, White noise player
✅ Audio playback ready
💾 Storage / Offline
Offline access, Data persist karna, App cache
⏰ Background Sync / Wake Lock
Screen ON rakho timer ke dauran

🔔 Notifications & Reminders
Task Reminder (Subah 8 baje)
Pending tasks ki reminder
Study Log Reminder (Raat 9 baje)
Roz raat study log fill karne ki yaad
🔥 Streak Reminder (Sham 6 baje)
Streak tootne se bachao — roz yaad dilayega
📚 Custom Topics — Subject-wise
Koi custom topic nahi. Upar se add karo!
⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts
Alt+1…0Tabs switch (Dashboard to Settings) Alt+TTheme Toggle (Dark/Light/AMOLED/Purple/Ocean) Alt+FFocus Mode — fullscreen distraction-free timer Alt+NQuick Note — kisi bhi page se note save karo Alt+WWeak Chapters — analyze karo instantly SpaceTimer Start/Pause (Timer page ya Focus Mode) EscModal / Sidebar / Focus Mode band karo
🎯 Daily Study Targets (Hours per Subject)
💡 Yeh targets dashboard pe progress bar mein dikhenge
💾 Data & Export
💡 Auto-save active hai — sab data automatically save hota hai LocalStorage mein.
📥 "Download Full App" se ek HTML file milegi jisme sab data embedded hoga.
🔒 "Share with Password" se password-locked file milegi — bina password ke open nahi hogi!
🔥 Firebase Cloud Sync — Phone ↔ Laptop
Phone aur laptop dono pe ek hi data — real-time sync! 🔥
Neeche Firebase details dalo — ek baar setup, hamesha sync.
